titleStmt.title: SII 41.373: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 373. (A.R. No. 588 of 1905.) Vijayamaṅgalam, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the south wall of the goddess temple in the Nāgēśvarasvāmi temple at Vijayamaṅgalam.

summary.p: Gift of the village of Āmūr alias Rāhuttarāyanallūr in Kuṟuppu-nāḍu with all its taxes by the nāṭṭavar of that nāḍu as dēvadāna to the Tirunāgīśvaramuḍaiyār temple in Vijaiyamaṅgalam. The taxes given are mentioned as kaḍamai, elavai, oṭṭachchu-kāl, kalam, uppāyam, teṇḍavari, taṇṇīrkāṇam, vēṇḍukōḷ, viniyōgam, taṟiyiṟai, taṭṭārappāṭṭam, and īḻampuñjey.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīman pradhāpacakravatti bhojai bhujabala viravallāḷadevar prathivi rājyam paṇṇiyaruḷā niṉṟa dundubhi samvatsarattu paṅkuṉi mātaṅ kuṟuppu ṉāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom vicaiyamaṅkalattu Āḷuṭaiyār tirunākiśavaramuṭaiya nāya
ṉārkkut tirunāṭpaṭi palapaṭinimantan tiruppaṇikku Eṅkaḷ nāṭṭilāmurāṉa Irākuttarāyanallūr Iṉṉāyakaṟku devatāṉamāka Iṭṭu Ivvūrkkaṭamai Elavai Oṭṭaccukkāluṅ kalam Uppāyan teṇṭavari taṇṇirkkāṇam veṇṭukoḷ viṉiyoka
n taṟiyiṟai taṭṭārppāṭṭam Īḻampuṉcey maṟṟum Eṟperppaṭṭaṉavum Ivvūr nāṉ kellaikkupaṭṭa puṉceyuṅ kuḷamuṅ kuḷakkiḻ vayalum Aṇaiyum Aṇaikkiḻ vayalum kiḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟum meṉokkiya maramum Iṟaiyili muṟṟūṭṭāka Udakam pa
ṇṇit tirucculasthāpakam paṇṇikkuṭuttoṅ kuṟuppu ṉāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom It taṉmam vilakkaṉiṉaittavaṉ vaḻivaḻi Eḻeccamaṟuvāṉ Itu paṉmāheśavararakṣaiśubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 41.373 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
